---
title: "Mentoring"
format: html
bibliography: "data/VH library.bib"
---

```{r}
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(yaml)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(RefManageR)

#Read in mentees
mentees <- yaml::read_yaml("data/mentoring.yml")

#Read in manuscripts
refs <- ReadBib("data/VH library.bib")

#Helps to link to projects
slugify <- function(x) {
  x <- tolower(x)
  x <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "-", x)
  x <- gsub("(^-|-$)", "", x)
  x
}

clean_braces <- function(x) {
  gsub("\\{|\\}", "", x)
}

render_mentee <- function(m) {
  
  cat("### ", m$name, "\n\n", sep = "")
  
  # Level
  if (!is.null(m$level)) {
    lvl <- if (is.vector(m$level)) paste(m$level, collapse = ", ") else m$level
    cat("*", lvl, "*\n\n", sep = "")
  }
  
  # Your role
  if (!is.null(m$role)) {
    role_val <- if (is.vector(m$role)) paste(m$role, collapse = ", ") else m$role
    cat("**Mentorship role:** ", role_val, "\n\n", sep = "")
  }
  
  if (!is.null(m$current)) {
    cat("**Current position:** ", m$current, "  \n", sep = "")
  }
  
  if (!is.null(m$years)) {
    cat("**Years:** ", m$years, "  \n", sep = "")
  }
  
  if (!is.null(m$link)) {
    cat("[Profile link](", m$link, ")\n\n", sep = "")
  }
  
  cat("\n")
  
  if (!is.null(m$text)) {
    cat(m$text, "\n\n")
  }
  
  # 🔗 Projects with working anchors
  if (!is.null(m$projects)) {
    cat("**Projects**\n\n")
    
    for (p in m$projects) {
      anchor <- slugify(p)
      cat("- [", p, "](projects.html#", anchor, ")\n", sep = "")
    }
    
    cat("\n")
  }
  
  # 📚 Manuscripts
  if (!is.null(m$manuscripts)) {
    cat("**Manuscripts**\n\n")
    
    for (k in m$manuscripts) {
      
      if (!is.null(refs[[k]])) {
        title <- clean_braces(refs[[k]]$title)
      } else {
        title <- k  # fallback if key missing
      }
      
      cat("- [", title, "](manuscripts.html#", k, ")\n", sep = "")
    }
    
    cat("\n")
  }
  
  
  cat("---\n\n")
}


```

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}

cat("## Active Mentees\n\n")

active <- purrr::keep(mentees, ~ .x$status == "Active")

walk(active, render_mentee)

```



```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}

cat("## Former Mentees\n\n")

former <- purrr::keep(mentees, ~ .x$status == "Former")

walk(former, render_mentee)

```
